properties.name: logging.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the json-logging auto-configuration.

properties.name: logging.excluded-paths
properties.description: Comma-separated list of URI patterns to exclude from logging. Supports Ant-style path patterns (e.g. /actuator/**,/health).

properties.name: logging.masking.enabled
properties.description: Enable automatic masking of sensitive values (passwords, tokens, etc.) in log output.
